Video.summary: In "The Family", Ed is going on an out-of-town trip...but Eunice and Mickey want to come along.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: The hilarious spoof "Went With The Wind!" is presented for your entertainment. Dinah Shore guest stars.
Video.title: Dinah Shore

Video.summary: Kaye Ballard & Steve Lawrence star. Featuring the movie spoof "Operation Minestrone" & "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Kaye Ballard, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Guest stars Bernadette Peters, Nancy Wilson, and The Burgundy Street Singers.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: Guests Chita Rivera and Vince Edwards help spoof "distinguished women's movies" in "To Each Her Own Tears."
Video.title: Chita Rivera, Vince Edwards

Video.summary: Guests John Davidson and Ross Martin appear in "The Helen Feibelbaum Story", a spoof of celebrity biopics.
Video.title: Ross Martin, John Davidson

Video.summary: Guest Neil Sedaka joins the gang for a set of commercial parodies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Neil Sedaka

Video.summary: Pat Carroll and Jack Jones guest. Pat and Carol play competing actresses. Plus: "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Jack Jones

Video.summary: Martha Raye guests, appearing in "Carol & Sis" as an Irish maid. Harvey fantasizes about being a matador.
Video.title: Martha Raye

Video.summary: Guest star Steve Lawrence takes the stage to sing a duet with Dick.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence stars in a take-off on film "Double Indemnity"..here named "Double Calamity", with Carol too.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Carol's good luck charm Jim Nabors guest stars!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Tim has to write a eulogy for his best friend. On "As The Stomach Turns", things turn bionic after a funeral.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Valerie Harper & Tim Conway guest! Valerie joins Carol on a date, and Tim is the world's oldest fireman.
Video.title: Valerie Harper, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Carol plays a housewife obsessed with celebrity gossip. Then, a take-off on a classic with "Rebecky."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence, The Captain & Tennille appear in spoofs, while Steve and Carol reveal a secretary's thoughts.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille

Image.alt: Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Betty Grable guest in the soap opera spoof "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Martha Raye, Betty Grable

Video.summary: Tim Conway steals Carol's heart in a sketch about two shoppers browsing waterbeds.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Diahann Carroll

Video.summary: Anthony Newley & Bernadette Peters guest. Featuring The Invisible Man's mother and a man who can get anything.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Anthony Newley

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence plays the director of a play put on by the P.T.A., and a hitman hired to kill Carol's husband.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Guests Art Carney and Nanette Fabray appear in "Guess What's Coming To Dinner?" and "Passion On 10th Avenue."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Art Carney

Video.summary: Hal Linden takes a leave from the 12th Precinct to cut it up with Carol & company!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Hal Linden

Video.summary: Mr. Tudball takes his secretary Mrs. Wiggins out for lunch.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway is featured in two sketches, pairing him with Harvey and Carol, respectively.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tim Conway guests for the movie spoof "Sinful Woman", a presentation of the Lyle-hosted Tearjerker Theatre.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry is back to sing and dance his way into your heart.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Totie Fields take part in Carol & Sis" and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ken Berry, Totie Fields

Video.summary: Rita Moreno guest stars as a nurse to the accident-prone Carol. Also featured: Tim as a hapless officer.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Rita Moreno

Video.summary: Kitchen commercials highlight this episode, and Tim returns as the steelworker looking to do away with Carol.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Invisible dogs run amok in an obedience class, while insurance agent Carol pesters doctor Tim.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guests Steve Lawrence and Bernadette Peters each team up with Carol in another delightful night of comedy.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: Tonight, Tim and Carol spar over a late-night phone call.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: In this episode, Carol contends with a peeping tom. Later, Carol, Dick, Vicki, and Tim offer up a concert.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Ross Martin and John Davidson guest! John shows off his pipes, and Harvey is interrupted by an extortionist.
Video.title: Ross Martin, John Davidson

Video.summary: Anthony Newley & Dick Martin appear in a tribute to movie detectives, and Carol & Vicki are ready to mingle.
Video.title: Anthony Newley, Dick Martin

Video.summary: Paul Lynde guests as a real estate man. Also: The 10th Avenue Family & a performance from Carol's Charwoman.
Video.title: Paul Lynde
